name: Cority EHS & Occupational Health API
what_it_does: Cority REST API for enterprise EHS (Environment, Health & Safety) and occupational health management platform. Enables AI agents to manage safety incident and near-miss reporting for safety program management, handle occupational health case and medical surveillance data for employee health compliance, access industrial hygiene exposure monitoring and risk assessment data, retrieve environmental compliance monitoring and permit tracking data, manage safety training completion and certification tracking, handle ergonomics assessment and musculoskeletal risk data, access corrective action tracking and CAPA management data for safety improvement, retrieve regulatory compliance status across OSHA, EPA, and global regulations, manage contractor safety prequalification and orientation data, and integrate EHS data with HR, ERP, and enterprise health management systems.
use_cases: Processing safety incidents from EHS program automation agents
Tracking occupational health cases from medical surveillance agents
Monitoring training compliance from safety certification agents
Aggregating environmental data from compliance reporting agents
not_for: Consumer health without occupational and industrial health management focus
Simple safety checklists without enterprise EHS and health surveillance
Non-industrial environments without OSHA and occupational health requirements
best_when: A manufacturing, mining, or industrial company using Cority wants AI agents to automate safety incident tracking, occupational health surveillance, training compliance, and regulatory reporting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Occupational health data includes medical records and health surveillance data regulated by HIPAA and ADA — automated access requires strict data governance and need-to-know controls. SAFETY RISK: Safety incident routing automation must follow OSHA notification requirements and configured escalation paths; bypassing notification chains violates regulatory requirements.

auth.notes: Cority uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-tenant credentials. Integration documentation at cority.com. Webhooks for EHS event notifications. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Ontario HQ. Strong in healthcare, manufacturing, and mining verticals. Occupational health (OH) module with medical record management. OSHA 300 log integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; module count and employee count determine pricing
pricing.notes: Toronto, Ontario. Founded 2000. Private. Enterprise EHS and occupational health market. 1,500+ customers in 100+ countries. Strong in healthcare, manufacturing, and resources sectors. Occupational health module differentiates from pure EHS platforms. Competes with Enablon and Intelex for enterprise EHS market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in integration portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Occupational health records are HIPAA-regulated medical information; automated access requires data governance controls and minimum necessary access principles
OSHA notification requirements — safety incident routing must follow OSHA 300 log and fatality/hospitalization notification requirements; automated routing bypassing notification is a violation
Medical surveillance data sensitivity — industrial hygiene exposure monitoring and biological monitoring results contain sensitive medical data requiring special access controls
ADA accommodation data — medical information used for ADA reasonable accommodations has special legal protections; limit automated access to aggregate rather than individual records
Module licensing — Cority EHS, occupational health, and industrial hygiene modules are separately licensed; API access requires appropriate module subscription
OSHA 300 log accuracy — automated incident classification affects OSHA recordability determinations; incorrect classification has regulatory and workers' comp implications
agent_readiness.security_notes: EHS and occupational health. SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/CA. Safety incident and medical surveillance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: EHS and occupational health. SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Safety and medical data.
